company.name: GeethaFoods Co.
company.description: Premium quality fresh and frozen produce for businesses and households. Browse our catalog and order directly via WhatsApp.

products.name: French Fries — Regular Cut
products.description: Freshly cut potato fries, ready to cook. Made from premium-grade potatoes, uniform in size for even frying. Perfect for restaurants, cafes, and fast food outlets.

products.name: French Fries — Signature Cut
products.description: Our exclusive signature-cut fries — a unique style that sets your menu apart. Made from hand-selected premium potatoes, freshly cut daily. Delivers an exceptional texture and presentation that customers will remember.

products.name: Frozen Momos
products.description: Handcrafted steamed dumplings filled with seasoned vegetables and minced meat. Flash-frozen to lock in freshness. Available in packs of 20 pieces. Ready in minutes — steam, fry, or pan-toss.

products.name: Fresh Potato Wedges
products.description: Thick-cut skin-on potato wedges, freshly prepared daily. Seasoned with a light herb blend. Great for restaurants, pubs, and catering. Oven-bake or deep-fry ready.

products.name: Fresh Tater Tots
products.description: Bite-sized grated potato tots, freshly made and ready to fry or bake. Crispy on the outside, fluffy on the inside. A crowd favorite for kids menus and snack platters.

products.name: Frozen Spring Rolls
products.description: Crispy golden spring rolls filled with seasoned vegetables and glass noodles. Flash-frozen for maximum freshness. Deep-fry or air-fry straight from frozen. Available in packs of 10 pieces.
